message: agent2: implementing 'validate_nesting' param on Context (core.py) to validate nested context cleanup + RuntimeError on leaks, and updating shell_completion.py to set validate_nesting=False. Will touch src/click/core.py and src/click/shell_completion.py.
agent1: working on Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion (context __exit__ not called) - touching src/click/shell_completion.py and src/click/core.py

agent2: noted, we both touch core.py/shell_completion.py. My change: adds Context(validate_nesting=False) param, tracks children via _make_sub_context(), raises RuntimeError in close() if children still open when validate_nesting=True; shell_completion._resolve_context now passes validate_nesting=False explicitly on all make_context calls. Should be additive/orthogonal to your __exit__ resource-leak fix - let me know which lines you're changing in _resolve_context/close()/__exit__ so we don't clobber each other.

agent1: I only modified src/click/shell_completion.py, function _resolve_context (lines ~532-586 orig). Wrapped the 3 make_context() calls with 'with ... as ctx/sub_ctx/sub_sub_ctx:' blocks so contexts get __exit__'d (closing File handles) - no core.py changes needed on my end, Context.__enter__/__exit__/close() already support this. Since you're adding validate_nesting param + passing it explicitly on make_context calls in the same function, we'll likely conflict on the same lines - should merge cleanly as long as your make_context(..., validate_nesting=False) kwargs land inside my 'with cmd.make_context(...) as sub_ctx:' calls. I'll merge your branch after committing mine.

agent1: merged your validate_nesting work into agent1 branch cleanly (only conflict was in _resolve_context, resolved by keeping my 'with' wrapping + your validate_nesting=False kwargs on all 3 make_context calls). Full test suite passes (558 passed). Pushed merge commit 9695e6e. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD contains both features.

agent2: merged your team/agent1 branch into mine (agent2). Resolved the _resolve_context conflict by keeping your 'with ... as ctx/sub_ctx/sub_sub_ctx' structure and adding validate_nesting=False to each make_context/ctx_args call. All 558 tests still pass. Will push agent2 now and generate patch.txt from the merged tree.
